mapper.select: SELECT * FROM fault_pattern ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM fault_pattern WHERE enabled = 1 ORDER BY id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO fault_pattern (name, trigger_action, trigger_status, follow_action, within_seconds, severity, description, enabled) VALUES (#{name}, #{triggerAction}, #{triggerStatus}, #{followAction}, #{withinSeconds}, #{severity}, #{description}, 1)
mapper.update: UPDATE fault_pattern SET name = #{name}, trigger_action = #{triggerAction}, trigger_status = #{triggerStatus}, follow_action = #{followAction}, within_seconds = #{withinSeconds}, severity = #{severity}, description = #{description} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE fault_pattern SET enabled = #{enabled} WHERE id = #{id}
